## Publicaciones

### Artículos en Revistas

```{r}
render_publications(journal_articles, highlight_name = "Fabbri")
```

### Documentos de Trabajo

- Clonal evolution and genomic divergence in penile squamous cell carcinoma:
  insights from matched premalignant, normal, and tumor tissues.
- Cohort Profile Update: The Human Early Life Exposome (HELIX) Cohort.
